headline: Stable positive sentiment (score: +5.4)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 78% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Fears dominate despite negative scoring due to below-average engagement, but 21 strong-intensity quotes show people are genuinely worried about specific issues.

• Fear levels remain in the lower half of the historical range while frustrations dropped significantly from yesterday's elevated state.

• Optimism recovered notably from yesterday's low but still sits below typical levels with 60 strong-intensity quotes showing mixed sentiment.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
